  "complexity_notes": "Heavily generic-typed React data table module. Notable complexity: (1) useDataFetch uses AbortController for request cancellation and an 'ok' flag closure to prevent stale state updates after unmount/re-run. (2) Uses comma-operator idioms (e.g., 'ok || (setData(...), setPagination(...))') which are terse and reduce readability. (3) Selection managed via React Context with Set-based immutable updates. (4) Sorting supports custom sortFn per column or a generic comparator with null-safe, type-aware comparison. (5) Pagination window computation uses sliding logic to show up to 5 page buttons. (6) Strong accessibility support: role/aria-sort/aria-selected/aria-busy/aria-current attributes and keyboard handlers for sortable headers.
